title: [merge-conflict] worktree-worker20: coap_status.c
notes:
Commit: 7c2916f09
Added capacity checks in neighbors_get and routes_get to return INTERNAL_ERROR instead of silently capping count when callback exceeds CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_STATUS_MAX_* . This addresses the codereview finding from related beads on coap_status.c. Resolved merge conflict by preferring clean no-comment version with defensive error handling. Verified with git diff and build prep.
